backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a game account marketplace with user profiles, listings (create/read/mark-sold), and chat threads, with admin-only controls for listing management and role-based access control via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the rebranding of the app from 'GameVault'/'GameAccount Marketplace' to 'GAME BAZAR' across Layout.tsx, index.html, and BrowsePage.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'GAME BAZAR' and mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (browse, listing detail, chat, create, my-listings, profile, chats) wrapped in a dark ThemeProvider and Layout with ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Reusable full-screen access denied UI component displaying a shield icon, customizable title/message, and a 'Back to Browse' button for unauthorized route access.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Wrapper component that blocks unauthenticated users by showing a login prompt with an Internet Identity button, handling initializing and logging-in states.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar rendering Browse, Chats, Cart, and Profile tabs for all users, plus a Sell tab exclusively for admin users, with active-state neon green highlighting.
frontend/src/components/ChatBubble.tsx: Chat message bubble component that renders sent/received alignment, optional inline photo via ExternalBlob URL, text content, and a formatted timestamp.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with the 'GAME BAZAR' logo and login button, scrollable main content area, and a fixed bottom navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/ListingCard.tsx: Renders a clickable card for a game listing, displaying a thumbnail, price badge, game name, and truncated description, navigating to the listing detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing loading, login, or logout states and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/PhotoGallery.tsx: Displays a photo gallery with a main image, prev/next navigation arrows, dot indicators, and a thumbnail strip for multi-photo listings.
frontend/src/components/PhotoUploadPrevi: Provides a photo upload UI with previews of selected files, individual remove buttons, and an add-more input capped at a configurable maximum number of photos.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users without a profile to enter a gamer name, then saves it via the backend mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and status tracking via AuthClient, exposing a hook and provider component for use throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsAdmin.ts: A hook that checks whether the currently authenticated user's principal matches the hardcoded admin principal, returning admin status and loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching/creating/deleting listings, sending and retrieving chat messages, and managing user profiles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Rajdhani, Inter), sets up Tailwind, and defines a dark gaming-themed design system with CSS custom properties for colors, neon glow utilities, and scrollbar hiding.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/BrowsePage.tsx: Browse page that fetches all active listings, provides a search filter by game name, and renders them in a 2-column grid of ListingCards with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Individual chat page for a specific listing that displays message history with ChatBubble components, supports sending text and photo messages with upload progress, and is protected by AuthGuard.
frontend/src/pages/ChatsPage.tsx: Chats list page that fetches and displays all of the user's chat previews as clickable cards showing the listing title, last message, and timestamp, with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/CreateListingPage.tsx: Admin-only form page for creating a new game account listing with fields for game name, description, price, and up to 5 photos, with validation and navigation to the new listing on success.
frontend/src/pages/ListingDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single listing's details including photo gallery, price, and description, with options to initiate a buy/chat flow and an admin-only delete action via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/MyListingsPage.tsx: Shows the authenticated user's listings ('My Cart') with options to mark items as sold, delete them, and (for admins) create new listings.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's profile information including their principal ID and account status, with a logout button that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark gaming-themed design system with custom neon colors, fonts (Rajdhani/Inter), box shadows, border radii, and plugin integrations for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing/planned features for a mobile-first game account marketplace built on Internet Computer with Internet Identity auth.
